articles.author: Ellise Shafer
articles.title: Sebastian Stan Slams Donald Trump at Cannes: America Is in a 'Bad Place' - Variety
articles.description: Sebastian Stan slammed Trump during a Cannes press conference, saying America is "in a really, really bad place."
articles.content: Two years after his Donald Trump biopic “The Apprentice” premiered at Cannes, Sebastian Stan reflected on the role during the press conference for his new movie “Fjord,” saying America is “in a reall… [+2110 chars]
